message:
fix(codegen): Fix tuple unpacking and eval/exec for VM fallback

- Fix undeclared variable issue in tuple unpacking discards
  When tuple unpacking skips declaring unused variables, the VM fallback
  discard loop was still emitting `_ = &var;` for undeclared variables.
  Added isVarUnused() check to skip these in genTupleUnpack/genListUnpack.

- Fix string concat for eval/exec source arguments
  BinOp Add was generating PyValue.add() which returns PyValue, but
  runtime.eval() expects []const u8. Added genEvalSource helper that
  generates std.mem.concat for Add BinOps in eval/exec source args.

- Add __enter__/__exit__ methods to PyValue for context managers
  VM fallback results wrapped in PyValue need basic context manager
  support when used in with statements. Added minimal implementations
  that return self for __enter__ and false for __exit__.
